---
title: "Boundary Figures Report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
params:
  run_dir: ""
  script_dir: ""
  report_dir: ""
  dynamic_audit_dir: ""
  coupling_robustness_dir: ""
  cohort_name: "main"
  analysis_role: "primary"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(tidyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(forcats)
  library(knitr)
})

run_dir <- normalizePath(params$run_dir, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
cohort_name <- params$cohort_name
analysis_role <- params$analysis_role
cohort_title <- stringr::str_to_title(stringr::str_replace_all(cohort_name, "_", " "))
fig_dir <- params$report_dir
if (!nzchar(fig_dir)) {
  fig_dir <- file.path(run_dir, "08_figures", cohort_name)
}
dir.create(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

script_dir <- params$script_dir
if (!nzchar(script_dir)) {
  script_dir <- dirname(normalizePath(knitr::current_input(), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
}
script_dir <- normalizePath(script_dir, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
source(file.path(script_dir, "theme_khaki.R"))

read_optional_csv <- function(directory, filename) {
  path <- file.path(directory, filename)
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    return(tibble::tibble())
  }
  readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
}

filter_for_cohort <- function(data, cohort_name) {
  if (nrow(data) == 0) {
    return(data)
  }
  if (cohort_name == "main") {
    return(data %>% filter(patient_main_included %in% TRUE))
  }
  if (cohort_name == "sensitivity") {
    return(data %>% filter(patient_sensitivity_included %in% TRUE))
  }
  data
}

joint_path <- file.path(run_dir, "06_model_tables", "model_joint_long.csv")
band_metric_path <- file.path(run_dir, "06_model_tables", "model_band_metric_long.csv")
if (!file.exists(joint_path)) {
  stop("Missing model table: ", joint_path)
}
if (!file.exists(band_metric_path)) {
  stop("Missing model table: ", band_metric_path)
}

joint_all <- readr::read_csv(joint_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
band_metric_all <- readr::read_csv(band_metric_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
region_levels <- sort(unique(stats::na.omit(joint_all$region)))
region_palette <- c("1" = "#6E7F4D", "2" = "#A65E2E", "3" = "#7B3F3F", "4" = "#8B6F47")

joint <- filter_for_cohort(joint_all, cohort_name) %>%
  mutate(region = factor(region, levels = region_levels))
band_metric <- filter_for_cohort(band_metric_all, cohort_name) %>%
  mutate(region = factor(region, levels = region_levels))

stats_dir <- file.path(run_dir, "07_stats_r", cohort_name)
dynamic_audit_dir <- params$dynamic_audit_dir
if (!nzchar(dynamic_audit_dir)) {
  dynamic_audit_dir <- file.path(run_dir, "09_dynamic_audit")
}
coupling_robustness_dir <- params$coupling_robustness_dir
if (!nzchar(coupling_robustness_dir)) {
  coupling_robustness_dir <- file.path(run_dir, "10_coupling_robustness")
}

band_aggregated_pairs <- read_optional_csv(dynamic_audit_dir, "band_aggregated_pairs.csv")
if (nrow(band_aggregated_pairs) > 0) {
  band_aggregated_pairs <- band_aggregated_pairs %>%
    filter(cohort == cohort_name) %>%
    mutate(region = factor(region, levels = region_levels))
}
cohort_manifest <- read_optional_csv(dynamic_audit_dir, "cohort_manifest.csv")
hfo_consistency_results <- read_optional_csv(stats_dir, "hfo_network_consistency_results.csv")
robustness_summary_all <- read_optional_csv(coupling_robustness_dir, "robustness_summary.csv")
stability_matrix_all <- read_optional_csv(coupling_robustness_dir, "stability_matrix.csv")
inclusion_threshold_scan <- read_optional_csv(coupling_robustness_dir, "inclusion_threshold_scan.csv")
distance_threshold_scan <- read_optional_csv(coupling_robustness_dir, "distance_threshold_scan.csv")

robustness_summary <- robustness_summary_all %>%
  filter(cohort == cohort_name)
stability_matrix <- stability_matrix_all %>%
  filter(cohort == cohort_name)

cohort_suffix <- if (analysis_role == "primary") {
  paste0(cohort_title, " Cohort")
} else {
  paste0(cohort_title, " Cohort (Exploratory)")
}

robustness_palette <- c(
  supported = khaki_palette$accent,
  exploratory = khaki_palette$accent2,
  threshold_sensitive = "#7B3F3F",
  artifact_risk = "#6B5A7A",
  insufficient = khaki_palette$border,
  stable = khaki_palette$accent,
  significance_loss = khaki_palette$accent2,
  direction_reversal = "#7B3F3F",
  not_applicable = "#CEC1A7"
)

empty_plot <- function(title, subtitle = "No analyzable rows were available for this figure.") {
  ggplot() +
    annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0.1, label = title, fontface = "bold", size = 5, color = khaki_palette$text) +
    annotate("text", x = 0, y = -0.1, label = subtitle, size = 3.4, color = khaki_palette$text) +
    xlim(-1, 1) +
    ylim(-1, 1) +
    labs(title = title) +
    theme_void() +
    theme_boundary_khaki()
}

save_plot <- function(plot_obj, filename, width = 10, height = 6) {
  ggplot2::ggsave(
    filename = file.path(fig_dir, filename),
    plot = plot_obj,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    dpi = 300,
    bg = khaki_palette$plot_bg
  )
}

add_region_points <- function(plot_obj, data, x_col, y_col) {
  plot_obj +
    geom_boxplot(
      data = data,
      aes(x = .data[[x_col]], y = .data[[y_col]], fill = .data[[x_col]]),
      alpha = 0.82,
      outlier.shape = NA,
      width = 0.65
    ) +
    geom_jitter(
      data = data,
      aes(x = .data[[x_col]], y = .data[[y_col]], color = .data[[x_col]]),
      width = 0.18,
      height = 0,
      alpha = 0.5,
      size = 1.2
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = region_palette, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_color_manual(values = region_palette, drop = FALSE)
}
```

```{r figures}
main_findings <- c(
  "overall_coupling",
  "region2_coupling",
  "region2_ac_elevation",
  "region2_fragility_reduction"
)

fragility_metrics <- c("fragility_high_ratio", "fragility_p75", "fragility_p90")
fragility_labels <- c(
  fragility_high_ratio = "Fragility High Ratio",
  fragility_p75 = "Fragility P75",
  fragility_p90 = "Fragility P90"
)

ac_metric <- "average_controllability_p90"

if (nrow(cohort_manifest) > 0) {
  manifest_plot_data <- cohort_manifest %>%
    mutate(
      cohort = factor(cohort, levels = c("main", "sensitivity", "full_modelable")),
      cohort_label = forcats::fct_recode(
        cohort,
        "Main" = "main",
        "Sensitivity" = "sensitivity",
        "Full modelable" = "full_modelable"
      )
    ) %>%
    select(cohort_label, patient_count, interval_count) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(patient_count, interval_count), names_to = "measure", values_to = "count") %>%
    mutate(
      measure = factor(
        measure,
        levels = c("patient_count", "interval_count"),
        labels = c("Patients", "Intervals")
      )
    )

  p_cohort <- ggplot(manifest_plot_data, aes(x = cohort_label, y = count, fill = measure)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), width = 0.68, alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Patients" = khaki_palette$accent, "Intervals" = khaki_palette$accent2)) +
    labs(
      title = "Figure 1. Cohort Definition and Analytical Coverage",
      subtitle = paste("Current rendered report:", cohort_suffix),
      x = NULL,
      y = "Count",
      fill = NULL
    ) +
    theme_boundary_khaki()
} else {
  p_cohort <- empty_plot("Figure 1. Cohort Definition and Analytical Coverage")
}
save_plot(p_cohort, "Figure1_cohort_definition_and_coverage.png", width = 9, height = 6)

fragility_plot_data <- band_metric %>%
  filter(metric_family %in% fragility_metrics, !is.na(feature_z), !is.na(region)) %>%
  mutate(
    metric_family = factor(metric_family, levels = fragility_metrics, labels = fragility_labels[fragility_metrics])
  )

if (nrow(fragility_plot_data) > 0) {
  p_fragility <- add_region_points(ggplot(), fragility_plot_data, "region", "feature_z") +
    facet_wrap(~ metric_family, nrow = 1) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Figure 2. Fragility Metrics Show the Clearest Regional Separation:", cohort_suffix),
      subtitle = "Main text regional effect should be anchored to fragility, not to a broad multi-metric panel.",
      x = "Region",
      y = "Patient-normalized feature value"
    ) +
    theme_boundary_khaki() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
} else {
  p_fragility <- empty_plot(paste("Figure 2. Fragility Metrics by Region:", cohort_suffix))
}
save_plot(p_fragility, "Figure2_fragility_region_contrasts.png", width = 12, height = 5.8)

phenotype_data <- band_aggregated_pairs %>%
  filter(!is.na(feature_z_average_controllability), !is.na(feature_z_fragility), !is.na(region))

cohort_rho <- robustness_summary %>%
  filter(finding_id == "overall_coupling") %>%
  pull(observed_value)
cohort_rho_label <- if (length(cohort_rho) > 0 && !is.na(cohort_rho[[1]])) {
  paste0("Overall rho = ", sprintf("%.3f", cohort_rho[[1]]))
} else {
  "Overall rho unavailable"
}

if (nrow(phenotype_data) > 0) {
  p_ac_nf <- ggplot(
    phenotype_data,
    aes(x = feature_z_average_controllability, y = feature_z_fragility, color = region)
  ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = khaki_palette$border, linewidth = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = khaki_palette$border, linewidth = 0.7) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.72, size = 1.9) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = khaki_palette$text, linewidth = 0.9) +
    annotate(
      "label",
      x = Inf,
      y = Inf,
      hjust = 1.02,
      vjust = 1.2,
      label = cohort_rho_label,
      fill = khaki_palette$panel_bg,
      color = khaki_palette$text,
      label.size = 0.2
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = region_palette, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Figure 3. Average Controllability and Fragility Form a Stable Inverse Coupling:", cohort_suffix),
      subtitle = "This is the strongest and most reproducible result in the current dataset.",
      x = "Average controllability z-score",
      y = "Fragility z-score",
      color = "Region"
    ) +
    theme_boundary_khaki()
} else {
  p_ac_nf <- empty_plot(paste("Figure 3. AC-NF Phenotype Space:", cohort_suffix))
}
save_plot(p_ac_nf, "Figure3_ac_nf_inverse_coupling.png", width = 8.8, height = 7)

robustness_heatmap_data <- robustness_summary_all %>%
  filter(finding_id %in% main_findings) %>%
  mutate(
    cohort = factor(cohort, levels = c("main", "sensitivity", "full_modelable")),
    finding_label = factor(
      finding_label,
      levels = c(
        "Overall AC-NF coupling",
        "Region 2 AC-NF coupling",
        "Region 2 minus Region 1 average controllability",
        "Region 2 minus Region 1 fragility"
      )
    ),
    robustness_status = factor(
      robustness_status,
      levels = c("supported", "threshold_sensitive", "exploratory", "artifact_risk", "insufficient")
    ),
    tile_label = dplyr::case_when(
      finding_kind == "coupling" ~ sprintf("rho=%.3f", observed_value),
      TRUE ~ sprintf("effect=%.3f", observed_value)
    )
  )

if (nrow(robustness_heatmap_data) > 0) {
  p_robustness <- ggplot(
    robustness_heatmap_data,
    aes(x = cohort, y = finding_label, fill = robustness_status)
  ) +
    geom_tile(color = khaki_palette$plot_bg, linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_text(aes(label = tile_label), size = 3.1, color = khaki_palette$text) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = robustness_palette, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = "Figure 4. Robustness Summary Across Cohorts",
      subtitle = "AC-NF coupling remains supported across cohorts; region-level AC and fragility contrasts are weaker.",
      x = NULL,
      y = NULL,
      fill = "Status"
    ) +
    theme_boundary_khaki() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"))
} else {
  p_robustness <- empty_plot("Figure 4. Robustness Summary Across Cohorts")
}
save_plot(p_robustness, "Figure4_cross_cohort_robustness_heatmap.png", width = 11.5, height = 6.3)

threshold_scan_plot_data <- inclusion_threshold_scan %>%
  filter(finding_id %in% main_findings) %>%
  mutate(
    finding_label = factor(
      finding_label,
      levels = c(
        "Overall AC-NF coupling",
        "Region 2 AC-NF coupling",
        "Region 2 minus Region 1 average controllability",
        "Region 2 minus Region 1 fragility"
      )
    )
  )

if (nrow(threshold_scan_plot_data) > 0) {
  p_threshold <- ggplot(
    threshold_scan_plot_data,
    aes(x = threshold_value, y = observed_value, group = 1)
  ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = khaki_palette$border, linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.95, alpha = 0.9, color = khaki_palette$accent2) +
    geom_point(size = 2.1, color = khaki_palette$accent2) +
    facet_wrap(~ finding_label, scales = "free_y") +
    labs(
      title = "Figure 5. Inclusion-Threshold Stability Scan",
      subtitle = "Coupling stays negative and stable; region-2 AC elevation is much less stable as thresholds change.",
      x = "Minimum usable intervals per patient",
      y = "Observed value"
    ) +
    theme_boundary_khaki()
} else {
  p_threshold <- empty_plot("Figure 5. Inclusion-Threshold Stability Scan")
}
save_plot(p_threshold, "Figure5_inclusion_threshold_stability_scan.png", width = 12, height = 8)

ac_fragility_region_data <- band_metric %>%
  filter(metric_family %in% c(ac_metric, "fragility_p90"), !is.na(feature_z), !is.na(region)) %>%
  mutate(
    metric_family = factor(
      metric_family,
      levels = c(ac_metric, "fragility_p90"),
      labels = c("Average controllability P90", "Fragility P90")
    )
  )

if (nrow(ac_fragility_region_data) > 0) {
  p_region_side_by_side <- add_region_points(ggplot(), ac_fragility_region_data, "region", "feature_z") +
    facet_wrap(~ metric_family, nrow = 1) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Supplementary Figure 1. Region-2 AC Elevation Is Weaker Than Fragility Reduction:", cohort_suffix),
      x = "Region",
      y = "Patient-normalized feature value"
    ) +
    theme_boundary_khaki() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
} else {
  p_region_side_by_side <- empty_plot(paste("Supplementary Figure 1. AC and Fragility Region Contrasts:", cohort_suffix))
}
save_plot(p_region_side_by_side, "SupplementaryFigure1_region2_ac_vs_fragility.png", width = 10.5, height = 5.6)

if (nrow(hfo_consistency_results) > 0 && "rho" %in% names(hfo_consistency_results)) {
  hfo_consistency_plot_data <- hfo_consistency_results %>%
    filter(!is.na(rho), !is.na(network_feature)) %>%
    mutate(network_feature = forcats::fct_infreq(network_feature))

  if (nrow(hfo_consistency_plot_data) > 0) {
    p_hfo_consistency <- ggplot(hfo_consistency_plot_data, aes(x = network_feature, y = rho, fill = network_feature)) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = khaki_palette$border, linewidth = 0.7) +
      geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.82, outlier.size = 0.7) +
      scale_fill_manual(
        values = c(
          average_controllability = khaki_palette$accent,
          mec = khaki_palette$accent2,
          neural_fragility = khaki_palette$accent3,
          source_sink_index = khaki_palette$border
        ),
        drop = FALSE
      ) +
      labs(
        title = paste("Supplementary Figure 2. HFO-Network Correspondence Remains Limited:", cohort_suffix),
        subtitle = "Median patient-level correlations stay close to zero and should not drive the main narrative.",
        x = "Network feature",
        y = "Patient-level Spearman rho"
      ) +
      theme_boundary_khaki() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 22, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none")
  } else {
    p_hfo_consistency <- empty_plot(paste("Supplementary Figure 2. HFO-Network Correspondence:", cohort_suffix))
  }
} else {
  p_hfo_consistency <- empty_plot(paste("Supplementary Figure 2. HFO-Network Correspondence:", cohort_suffix))
}
save_plot(p_hfo_consistency, "SupplementaryFigure2_hfo_network_consistency.png", width = 10, height = 6)
```

## Main Figures

### Figure 1

```{r}
print(p_cohort)
```

### Figure 2

```{r}
print(p_fragility)
```

### Figure 3

```{r}
print(p_ac_nf)
```

### Figure 4

```{r}
print(p_robustness)
```

### Figure 5

```{r}
print(p_threshold)
```

## Supplementary Figures

### Supplementary Figure 1

```{r}
print(p_region_side_by_side)
```

### Supplementary Figure 2

```{r}
print(p_hfo_consistency)
```
